name: mzansi-spares-platform
description: Monorepo for mzansi-spares-platform multi-tenant SaaS marketplace admin system.

scripts.lint: npm run lint:eslint && npm run lint:prettier && npm run lint:workspaces
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:ts && npm run typecheck:workspaces
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:workspaces
scripts.test:unit: node --test apps/web/test/*.test.js apps/api-gateway/test/*.test.js apps/identity-service/test/*.test.js apps/tenant-service/test/*.test.js apps/vendor-service/test/*.test.js apps/catalog-service/test/*.test.js apps/inventory-service/test/*.test.js apps/search-sync-service/test/*.test.js apps/notification-service/test/*.test.js apps/billing-service/test/*.test.js packages/authz/test/*.test.js
